title: PlanReviewPrecheckOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_precheck`: the DET-floor (P1-P9) result. `run_llm` is true iff the four-pass LLM review should run; `verdict` is the terminal short-circuit plan_review_verdict when it should NOT, else null. Reconciled with bespoke run_review (story B5): the LLM is SHORT-CIRCUITED only for an exempt type or a P8-too-big plan; a P1/P5 DET block does NOT short-circuit — the LLM runs and `det_blocking` is merged at decide-time. The DET findings + coverage are threaded to the decide/coach ops.

run_llm.description: True iff the LLM review (assemble→batch→verify→decide→coach) should run.

verdict.description: The deterministic short-circuit plan_review_verdict (exempt PASS or DET BLOCK), else null.

review_phase.description: Compiled lifecycle phase used by Pass-3.

hierarchy_incomplete.description: True when child enumeration or a per-child fetch exhausted its retries while assembling the ticket hierarchy — the review must never reach a clean PASS on incomplete hierarchy context.

hierarchy_incomplete_detail.description: Which hierarchy read(s) failed: the literal "enumeration" for a total list_tickets failure, or the failing child's ticket id(s) for per-child show_ticket failures.
